description: Ensure the 'key' exists in 'counters' with an initial value of 0
Increment the value associated with 'key' in 'counters' by 1

condition: cap is not None and counters[key] > cap
description: If 'cap' is not None and the value associated with 'key' exceeds 'cap', set it to 'cap'
Return the value associated with 'key' in 'counters'
